query: SELECT am.accountId, am.userId, am.role, a.name as accountName FROM account_members am JOIN accounts a ON a.id = am.accountId WHERE am.accountId = 420001
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT am.accountId, am.userId, am.role, a.name as accountName FROM account_members am JOIN accounts a ON a.id = am.accountId WHERE am.accountId = 420001
